name: 毁天灭地
description: 选择一个无遮挡和棋子的格子，从天而降降落到该格子并对以该格子为中心的3*3区域的敌人造成100%攻击力的物理伤害
code: function executeSkill(context) { console.log('[Earthshatter] Skill executing'); console.log('[Earthshatter] sourcePiece:', sourcePiece.name, 'at', sourcePiece.x, sourcePiece.y); const targetPos = selectTarget({ type: 'grid', range: 10, filter: 'all' }); console.log('[Earthshatter] targetPos:', targetPos); if (!targetPos || targetPos.needsTargetSelection) { console.log('[Earthshatter] Needs target selection or no target'); return targetPos; } console.log('[Earthshatter] Checking piece at target position'); const pieceAtPos = battle.pieces.find(p => p.x === targetPos.x && p.y === targetPos.y && p.currentHp > 0); if (pieceAtPos) { console.log('[Earthshatter] Position occupied by:', pieceAtPos.name); return { message: '该位置已有棋子', success: false }; } console.log('[Earthshatter] Moving sourcePiece to', targetPos.x, targetPos.y); sourcePiece.x = targetPos.x; sourcePiece.y = targetPos.y; console.log('[Earthshatter] sourcePiece new position:', sourcePiece.x, sourcePiece.y); const damageValue = sourcePiece.attack * context.skill.powerMultiplier; console.log('[Earthshatter] Damage value:', damageValue); const affectedEnemies = []; for (let dx = -1; dx <= 1; dx++) { for (let dy = -1; dy <= 1; dy++) { const checkPos = { x: targetPos.x + dx, y: targetPos.y + dy }; const enemyAtPos = battle.pieces.find(p => p.x === checkPos.x && p.y === checkPos.y && p.currentHp > 0 && p.ownerPlayerId !== sourcePiece.ownerPlayerId); if (enemyAtPos) { affectedEnemies.push(enemyAtPos); } } } if (affectedEnemies.length > 0) { const result = dealDamage(sourcePiece, affectedEnemies, damageValue, 'physical', battle, context.skill.id); return { message: sourcePiece.name + ' 从天而降，对 ' + affectedEnemies.map(e => e.name).join(', ') + ' 造成 ' + result.totalDamage + ' 点伤害', success: true }; } return { message: sourcePiece.name + ' 从天而降', success: true }; }
previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { const damageValue = Math.round(piece.attack * skillDef.powerMultiplier); return { description: '选择一个安全位置降落，对3*3区域内的敌人造成' + damageValue + '点伤害（相当于攻击力100%）', expectedValues: { damage: damageValue, area: '3*3' } }; }
